programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: He Kaha Lu'u Ke Ala, Mai Ho'okolo Aku

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Make Me Kai
programme.desc: McGarrett, Danny, Tani, and Junior are exposed to a deadly biological weapon; the rest of the team has eight hours to find an antidote.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: I Ka Wa Ma Mua, I Ka Wa Ma Hope
programme.desc: Danny is shot while quarantined in the hospital; unconscious, he clings to life and imagines a future for everyone.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Oni Kalalea Ke Ku a Ka La'au Loa
programme.desc: Danny tells Charlie a bedtime story about a case involving bad Santas and a holiday miracle.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ka Hopu Nui 'Ana
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was cracking down on organized crime is killed, McGarrett rounds up every gang-related criminal on the island to find the culprit responsible for the murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: O Ka Mea Ua Hala, Ua Hala Ia
programme.desc: Grover must prevent a man who is accused of killing his wife from committing suicide.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Dork Day Afternoon

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator to stop a deadly virus; Paige teaches Walter the concept of the "white lie"; Walter hits Cabe with a tranquilizer gun, and Toby must save his life.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game; Walter's secret night out with Florence puts Toby and Happy on edge.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when an unconscious boy gets stuck in the wheel well of an airborne airplane; Walter's white lie to Paige starts to take a toll on him; Paige realizes something is amiss.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Judgement Call
programme.desc: Pride must cut his vacation short when Hannah is suspended for breaking protocol during a joint investigation with the FBI.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Terminator Conundrum
programme.desc: A Navy pilot says she saw an unidentified object prior to a private plane crash; Pride suffers from insomnia and nightmares as a result of being kidnapped and drugged last year.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Bad Apple

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Overlooked
programme.desc: The team uncovers a sinister plot by a private detention center contracted by the government to house undocumented immigrants; Lasalle and Sebastian travel to Alabama to search for Lasalle's missing brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Spies & Lies
programme.desc: Navy Lt. Max Landry asks the New Orleans field office for help when he suspects his girlfriend is a spy; LaSalle faces another devastating dead end as he searches for his brother's last known whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Matthew 5:9
programme.desc: LaSalle hopes to avenge his brother's murder by tracking a drug ring in Alabama he believes is responsible; when Pride assists with the case, he crosses paths with Eddie Barrett, an elusive individual who knows more than he is sharing.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Boom-Boom-Boom-Boom
programme.desc: Following a natural gas explosion at a movie theater, the team discovers the gas company has been hacked and more explosions could be triggered.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Order of the Mongoose

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Convicted

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Requital
programme.desc: Pride is cut off from the team and backed into a corner after the investigation into Eddie Barrett uncovers a malicious plot.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Bad Moon Rising

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Waiting for Monroe

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Root of All Evil

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Red Suit

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Relentless

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.sub-title: Monolith

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Pilot

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Single Point of Failure

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.sub-title: Dia de Muertos + Sicarios + Family

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A mental-patient, who is troubled with horrible nightmares, has escaped from his hospital. Now on the streets he can’t help killing innocent people. But there is one family he is more than interested in and when he tries to kill them, he finds that it’s not that easy.

programme.title: Compañeros
programme.desc: A Swedish arms dealer and a Mexican peon team up to rescue the intellectual leader of the Revolutionary cause, while taking part in numerous misadventures along the way.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Alice, Sweet Alice
programme.desc: What's going on at that strange house at the end of the street, and why are little Alices' family members disappearing? Could Alice have anything to do with this? Noteworthy as Brooke Shields feature Debut.Genre:.

programme.title: The Pianist

When the Jews of the city find themselves forced into a ghetto, Szpilman finds work playing in a café; and when his family is deported in 1942, he stays behind, works for a while as a laborer, and eventually goes into hiding in the ruins of the war-torn city.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: On a fall night in 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programming genius Mark Zuckerberg sits down at his computer and heatedly begins working on a new idea. In a fury of blogging and programming, what begins in his dorm room as a small site among friends soon becomes a global social network and a revolution in communication. A mere six years and 500 million friends later, Mark Zuckerberg is the youngest billionaire in history... but for this entrepreneur, success leads to both personal and le.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happyness
programme.desc: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

programme.title: The Runner

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a former teacher moves back in with his parents and tries to reconcile with his ex-wife.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: In 1964, a brash, new pro boxer, fresh from his Olympic gold medal victory, explodes onto the scene: Cassius Clay. Bold and outspoken, he cuts an entirely new image for African Americans in sport with his proud public self-confidence and his unapologetic belief that he is the greatest boxer of all time. Yet at the top of his game, both Ali's personal and professional lives face the ultimate test.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: After serving 28 years in prison for accidentally killing the son of a crime boss, newly paroled gangster Val reunites with his former partners in crime, Doc and Hirsch, for a night on the town. As the three men revisit old haunts, reflect on their glory days and try to make up for lost time, one wrestles with a terrible quandary: Doc has orders to kill Val, and time is running out for him to figure out a way out of his dilemma.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: Billy "The Great" Hope, the reigning junior middleweight boxing champion, has an impressive career, a loving wife and daughter, and a lavish lifestyle. However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. He soon finds an unlikely savior in Tick Willis, a former fighter who trains the city's toughest amateur boxers. With his future on the line, Hope fights to reclaim the trust of those he loves the most.
